plan_type_rationale: Simple endpoint addition with minimal dependencies. No complex architecture changes or multi-phase coordination needed.
goal: add a /uptime endpoint that returns process uptime seconds
description: Create a simple HTTP endpoint that returns the process uptime in seconds

tasks.description: Add process start time tracking to server initialization
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Server tracks process.uptime() value on startup

tasks.description: Test endpoint with curl or HTTP client
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Endpoint responds with correct uptime value on multiple requests

success_criteria: GET /uptime endpoint exists and is accessible
Returns valid JSON with uptime_seconds field
Uptime value is a positive integer representing seconds
Endpoint works after server restart (resets to 0 or small value)
